title: Premium Set of 13 Stainless Steel Kitchen Tool Set with Holder Easy to Clean, Space Saving, Great for Cooking, Baking Prepping
features: 【100% FOOD GRADE STAINLESS STEEL】Made of food grade stainless steel. Safe, rustproof, resilient and will last long.It would feel well balance in hand. High grade stainless steel construction means your unique effects utensil set is durable, rust resistant and dishwasher safe. You will enjoy years of preparing meals for your family and loved ones.

﻿【PIECE COOKING UTENSILS SET】13-Pieces essential kitchen utensils set - The home hero premium metal cooking utensils set has everything you need to cook your favorite dish: a slotted spoon, solid spoon, skimmer, solid turner, slotted turner, ladle, tongs, potato masher, pasta spoon, carving fork, and utensils holder.

【COMFORTABLE ERGONOMIC HANDLES 】Our metal kitchen utensils are constructed with ergonomic hollow handles which provide your hands a comfortable grip while working in the kitchen, reducing hand fatigue. Reducing heat transfer, not easy to burn your hands.
